synopsis: A basement philosopher who brought cooler, harder edges to late-network Stevenhood.
editorialBlurb: Steven Hyde belongs to a particularly durable Steven lane: the too-knowing, too-young authority skeptic who makes the room feel rougher and more adult. He is less cuddly than many television Steves and more controlled than a classic chaos engine, which gives the name a sharper silhouette.
whyItMatters: He expands the index beyond soft or comic Steve energy and helps define the steely older-brother branch of televised Steven.
sourceNotes: Main cast Steven archetype with durable cultural recognition.
